info.title: GithubHelperTool
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 GithubHelperTool
copy-issue    Copy an issue and all of it's content & comments to a new repo.
move-issue    Move an issue and all of it's content & comments to a new repo.
This action also closes the underlying issue if it's still open.
help          Display more information on a specific command.
version       Display version information.

commands.name: copy-issue
commands.description: Copy an issue and all of it's content & comments to a new repo.

options.name: --from
options.description: Required. The link to the issue being transferred.

options.name: --to
options.description: Required. The link to the destination repository.

options.name: --pat
options.description:
A Github PAT from a user with sufficient permissions to perform
the invoked action.If not provided, the tool will attempt to use
the GitHub Credential Provider to acquire a token.

commands.name: move-issue
commands.description:
Move an issue and all of it's content & comments to a new repo.
This action also closes the underlying issue if it's still open.

options.name: --from
options.description: Required. The link to the issue being transferred.

options.name: --to
options.description: Required. The link to the destination repository.

options.name: --pat
options.description:
A Github PAT from a user with sufficient permissions to perform
the invoked action.If not provided, the tool will attempt to use
the GitHub Credential Provider to acquire a token.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.
